journalReflectionTitle.desc: AppBar title and saved-entry heading for the guided Daily Reflection journal template

journalReflectionSaving.desc: Save button label while the reflection is being saved

journalReflectionMoodTitle.desc: Section title above the mood picker on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionGratefulTitle.desc: Section title above the three gratitude lines on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionAnchorsTitle.desc: Section title above the recovery-action checklist (anchors) on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionAnchorReachedOut.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — contacting another person

journalReflectionAnchorMeeting.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — attending a support meeting or group

journalReflectionAnchorMoved.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — physical movement or exercise

journalReflectionAnchorAteHydrated.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — eating well and staying hydrated

journalReflectionAnchorMeds.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — taking prescribed medication

journalReflectionAnchorAvoidedTrigger.desc: Checklist item: a recovery anchor action — avoiding a known trigger

journalReflectionWinsTitle.desc: Section title above the 'wins today' free-text field on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionWinsHint.en: Anything you're proud of — big or small.
journalReflectionWinsHint.desc: Placeholder hint text for the 'wins today' field

journalReflectionCravingsTitle.desc: Section title above the cravings/triggers free-text field on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionCravingsHint.en: What showed up, and how did you respond?
journalReflectionCravingsHint.desc: Placeholder hint text for the cravings/triggers field

journalReflectionIntentionTitle.desc: Section title above the 'tomorrow's intention' free-text field on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionIntentionHint.en: One small thing you'll do for your recovery.
journalReflectionIntentionHint.desc: Placeholder hint text for the 'tomorrow's intention' field

journalReflectionAffirmationTitle.desc: Section title above the affirmation free-text field on the Daily Reflection page

journalReflectionAffirmationHint.en: A kind sentence in your own voice.
journalReflectionAffirmationHint.desc: Placeholder hint text for the affirmation field

journalReflectionFooter.en:
You don't have to fill every field.
What you write is enough.
journalReflectionFooter.desc: Reassuring footer note at the bottom of the Daily Reflection page; contains a line break

journalReflectionBodyGratefulHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the gratitude list; keep the emoji

journalReflectionBodyAnchorsHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the checked anchors list; keep the emoji

journalReflectionBodyWinsHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the wins section; keep the emoji

journalReflectionBodyCravingsHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the cravings section; keep the emoji

journalReflectionBodyIntentionHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the intention section; keep the emoji

journalReflectionBodyAffirmationHeading.desc: Heading written into the saved reflection entry text above the affirmation section; keep the emoji
